content.question: What is the administrative and fiscal cost of maintaining parallel 6/8-year extended-track networks versus consolidating into a single 4-year upper-secondary structure, and would reallocation of resources improve coverage and equity in underserved localities?
content.reduction_path: Conduct cost-benefit analysis of track-network maintenance including capital, staffing, and transportation; model resource reallocation scenarios and simulate coverage impacts in low-density settlement zones
